name: Flappy Pumpkin
description: In this game you can play with a Flappy Pumpkin! Just Tap to fly and try to pass across the robot poppy hands without touching them. Collect all medals and try to sign your personal highest score. Enjoy it!
instructions: Just one Click Tap to play
tags: 2D, Arcade, Boy, Casual, Click, Halloween, HTML, HTML5, Kid, Mobile, Racing
